name: ABM Campaign Account Reach
description: Track which target accounts ABM campaigns actually reach — joins ad-platform reach data with the target account list, surfaces hit rate, untouched accounts, and wasted reach. Replaces the monthly Excel exercise with a live dashboard.
alsoSurfaces: Which target accounts are our ABM campaigns actually reaching?
Which target accounts have zero meaningful reach?
How does reach intensity correlate with downstream engagement?
Where is campaign spend leaking to non-target accounts?
beforeWeRun: Which campaigns — all active ABM campaigns, or specific set?
Reach intensity threshold — 3, 5, or 10 impressions per individual?

whatYoullGet.name: Headline metrics
whatYoullGet.desc: Campaigns analyzed, hit rate, untouched account count, wasted reach %.

whatYoullGet.name: Campaigns table
whatYoullGet.desc: Sortable — hit rate, reach, spend, wasted reach, intensity per campaign.

whatYoullGet.name: Accounts reach table
whatYoullGet.desc: Sortable — target accounts × total reach, intensity, engagement velocity, classification.

whatYoullGet.name: Untouched accounts
whatYoullGet.desc: Card list of target accounts with zero meaningful reach.

whatYoullGet.name: Reach-to-engagement scatter
whatYoullGet.desc: Reach intensity (x) vs engagement velocity (y), with target accounts as points.

whatYoullGet.name: Wasted reach breakdown
whatYoullGet.desc: Per-campaign list of top non-target accounts receiving spend.

whatYoullGet.name: Reach distribution
whatYoullGet.desc: Histogram of reach intensity across reached target accounts.

callout: 4 quick inputs, then Sage builds your account-reach dashboard in ~9 min.
